ddls:
CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position held by the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the staff member's job */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the staff member */,
  "highest_degree" TEXT /* Highest degree earned by the staff member */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations or areas of expertise of the staff member */,
  "last_performance_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the staff member's last performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the position belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position's responsibilities */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Detailed list of responsibilities associated with the position */,
  "required_qualifications" TEXT /* Minimum qualifications required for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's purpose and functions */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* Mission statement of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_support_areas" (
  "support_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support area */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the support area */,
  "support_type" TEXT /* Type of support provided (e.g., academic, administrative, technical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_support_areas_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_contact_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact log */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who contacted the staff member */,
  "contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the contact */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the contact */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the issue or concern (e.g., resolved, pending, escalated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_contact_logs_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_contact_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, parent, faculty) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who uploaded the resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the resource */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the resource */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the resource (e.g., document, video, presentation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_resources_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member organizing the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., conference, workshop, meeting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., research, development, implementation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_staff" (
  "project_staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member in the project */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Detailed list of responsibilities of the staff member in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_staff_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_staff_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the schedule entry */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule entry */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule entry */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment or event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the schedule entry */,
  "recurring" INTEGER /* Whether the schedule entry is recurring (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_schedule_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance evaluation */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the staff member's performance */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided during the evaluation */,
  "areas_for_improvement" TEXT /* Areas identified for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_performance_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training session */,
  "training_type" TEXT /* Type of training (e.g., workshop, conference, webinar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_training_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_development_plans" (
  "development_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development plan */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the development plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the development plan */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals of the development plan */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Actions to be taken for the development plan */,
  "resources_needed" TEXT /* Resources needed for the development plan */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress update on the development plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("development_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_development_plans_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_based_access_control" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read-only, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_roles" (
  "staff_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_roles_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES role_based_access_control ("role_id")
)
